title: Miku-topia!
description: Welcome to Mikutopia! Not really, it isn't here yet. But you can make it hopefully! Advance your civilization until you are unstoppable!
body:
We're all free! Free to build whatever! Use advanced technology to do whatever you want! Create and destroy it all! And no more limits (like the ones that stop us from getting Protection XXX and Blast Protection CCLV, on the same helmet)

Not even the Earth's gravity can stop you! There's planes, and rockets now!

Mikutopia content on this channel: [https://www.youtube.com/@gamersagainstchickens](https://www.youtube.com/@gamersagainstchickens)

# Just a bunch of mods?

Miku-topia isn't just a conglomeration of 296 mods slapped together haphazardly! Some mod configs have been extensively changed, for example the thirst system added by Dehydration is altered to be much less tedious! There are over 12K lines of KubeJS code that alter world generation, as well as changing and adding a BUNCH of recipes so that mods work with each other! CC: Tweaked, Automobility, and Ad Astra recipes are almost entirely rewritten! No more crafting computers with just stone and redstone, you need complex materials from other mods! PocketGPS, CRN, Ad Astra, and Iammusicplayer recipes are also altered to require computers! There is a complex progression system, with the end goal to get beskar and khyber crystals.

# Who is Hatsune Miku?
Hatsune Miku is the creator of Minecraft and also the owner of the entire universe! Wait, so wouldn't this just be Minecraft 2? More seriously, Hatsune Miku is a vocaloid created in 2007. A vocaloid is basically a type of voice-synthesizing software designed for making singing vocals. You can get Hatsune Miku plushies in-game thanks to Boiler's mod or the Miku Plushies mod!

# Known Bugs
- Don't right-click Murder Drones plushies if you're the owner of the world, it won't end well.
- Emptying a stack of water bottles into water leaves you with just one empty bottle.
- Thirst Bar Freezes
- Adorn furniture is buggy to sit on
- Can't put moth elytra in cape slot
- Trims don't display on certain armor pieces
- Emojis don't display on some signs
- Trinkets might disappear on a crash
- Warden Knife can't cut
- Warden Banktank can't be put in back slot

# Tip
- Allocate more memory!!!

# Contact Us
Do you have any questions?
Do you need people to join your world for help?
Have you found a bug?
Are you having trouble figuring out what to do?
Wanna join a survival server with this modpack?
Or do you just want to chat with others?

**Then join the discord server!!! [https://discord.gg/K6X72Cm4Xa](https://discord.gg/K6X72Cm4Xa)**
